name: Tuna and Avocado Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the eggs and mash them well with a regular dinner fork.
2. Peel the avocado and squeeze half a lemon on it to prevent discoloration. Then mash it well with a fork.
3. Drain the water from the tuna and mix it with the chopped onions, mashed eggs, mashed avocado, dill relish or pickles, salt, and Louisiana hot sauce.
4. Mix everything together thoroughly.
5. Serve over lettuce.
